name: Easy Cream Soup Sauces
recipeIngredient: 10 oz canned cream soup, chicken, mushroom, celery or nacho cheese
1 tsp herbs of your choice (thyme, basil, tarragon, or oregano)
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir the cream soup into 4 cups of a glass measuring cup.
2. Add the milk and sour cream, then add the wine and herbs.
3. Mix well.
4. Cover with vented plastic wrap.
5. Microwave on high for 4-½ to 5 minutes or until hot. Stir twice.
6. Stir before serving.
